hero.label: Our Story
hero.title: About Soulmate
hero.subtitle: Your go-to store for unique and personalized gifts for your loved ones

story.intro: Soulmate is your go-to store for creating unique and personalized gifts for your loved ones.
story.body: We believe a gift is more than just a material thing — it's a message of love and appreciation. That's why we designed a unique experience that lets you choose and customize your gift box in a way that truly represents you.

variety.title: Wide Variety
variety.description: Carefully curated products from the best brands

customization.title: Full Customization
customization.description: Choose the box, pick the products, add your personal message

quality.title: High Quality
quality.description: All our products are original and guaranteed

delivery.title: Fast Delivery
delivery.description: We deliver your gift to your doorstep as fast as possible

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.body: We strive to be Egypt's premier destination for special occasion gifts — from birthdays and anniversaries to graduation and appreciation gifts. Our goal is for every gift to be a complete experience, starting from choosing the box and ending with a smile on your loved one's face.

cta.title: Ready to start?
cta.subtitle: Build the perfect gift box for your loved ones now

seo.description: Discover Soulmate Store — Egypt's premier destination for personalized luxury gifts and custom gift boxes for birthdays, anniversaries & special occasions.

privacy.intro: At Soulmate, we respect your privacy and are committed to protecting your personal data. This policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your information.

section1.title: Data We Collect
section1.item1: Name, email, and phone number upon registration
section1.item2: Shipping address when placing an order
section1.item3: Payment data (receipts only — we don't store card information)
section1.item4: Browsing data (cookies) to improve user experience

section2.title: How We Use Data
section2.item2: Communicating about order status and notifications
section2.item3: Improving user experience and developing our services
section2.item4: Sending offers and updates (with your consent only)

section3.title: Data Protection
section3.body: We use SSL/TLS encryption to protect your data during transmission, and store passwords with BCrypt encryption. We do not share your data with any third party without your consent.
section3.note: We store payment receipts on secured Cloudinary servers, and delete them after payment verification.

section4.title: Cookies
section4.body: We use essential cookies for login and maintaining your session. We do not use third-party tracking cookies.

section5.title: Your Rights
section5.item1: Access your personal data stored with us
section5.item2: Modify or update your data anytime from the profile page
section5.item3: Request deletion of your account and all data

section6.title: Contact
section6.body: If you have any questions about the privacy policy or wish to exercise your rights, contact us:

seo.title: Privacy Policy
seo.description: Soulmate's privacy policy — learn how we collect, use, and protect your personal data when using our services.

terms.intro: By using the Soulmate website, you agree to the following terms and conditions. Please read them carefully before using our services.

section1.title: Account & Registration
section1.item1: You must provide accurate and correct information upon registration
section1.item2: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account and password
section1.item3: You must be 18 years or older to use the website
section1.item4: We reserve the right to suspend or delete your account in case of violation

section2.title: Orders & Pricing
section2.item1: Prices are displayed in Egyptian Pounds and include tax
section2.item2: Orders are confirmed after payment receipt review and verification
section2.item3: We may cancel orders due to availability or payment issues
section2.item4: Pending orders without payment for over 48 hours are automatically cancelled
section2.note: Prices may change at any time, but confirmed orders remain at the price at time of order.

section3.title: Payment
section3.item1: Payment is made via bank transfer and uploading the payment receipt
section3.item2: Receipts are reviewed within 24 business hours
section3.item3: If a receipt is rejected, you can upload a new one (up to 3 attempts)

section4.title: Delivery
section4.item1: Delivery is available within Egypt only
section4.item2: Delivery time varies by location (usually 3-7 business days)
section4.item3: You are responsible for providing an accurate shipping address

section5.title: Intellectual Property
section5.body: All content on the website (images, text, designs, logos) belongs to Soulmate and is protected by intellectual property rights. Copying or republishing any content without prior written permission is not allowed.

section6.title: Terms Modification
section6.body: We reserve the right to modify the terms and conditions at any time. Changes are effective from the date of publication on the website. Continued use of the website constitutes acceptance of the modified terms.

section7.title: Contact
section7.body: If you have any questions about the terms and conditions:

seo.title: Terms & Conditions
seo.description: Terms and conditions for using the Soulmate website — learn about account, orders, payment, and delivery terms.

returnPolicy.intro: Your satisfaction is our priority. If you encounter any issues with your order, we're here to help.

section1.title: Return Conditions
section1.item1: The product must be in its original condition with full packaging
section1.item3: The product must be unused and in its original condition
section1.alert: Customized products (boxes with personal messages) are non-returnable.

section2.title: Return Steps
section2.step1Desc: Via the contact page or WhatsApp, explaining the reason for return and order number
section2.step2Desc: We'll review your request and respond within 24 business hours
section2.step3Desc: We'll contact you to arrange pickup of the product
section2.step4Desc: After inspecting the product, we'll refund within 7 business days

section3.title: Exchange
section3.body: If the product arrived damaged or different from the order, we offer a free exchange at no additional cost. In this case, contact us within 48 hours of receiving the order with photos showing the issue.

section4.title: Non-Returnable Items
section4.item3: Return requests after 7 days from delivery

cta.title: Need Help?
cta.subtitle: Contact us and we'll help you anytime

seo.title: Return & Exchange Policy
seo.description: Soulmate's return and exchange policy — learn about the conditions and steps for returning or exchanging products.

customGiftBox.title: Custom Gift Boxes
customGiftBox.heading: Build Your Custom Gift Box
customGiftBox.description: Create the perfect personalized gift box for your loved ones. Choose from men's, women's, or couples gift boxes, fill them with luxury products, and add your personal message.

features.title: Why Choose Custom Gift Boxes?
features.personalized: Fully personalized with names, dates & messages

seo.title: Custom Gift Boxes — Build Your Personalized Gift Box
seo.description: Build a custom gift box with personalized products, engraved names & special messages. Choose men's, women's or couples boxes. Premium packaging & fast delivery in Egypt.

coupleGifts.title: Couple Gifts
coupleGifts.heading: Couple Gift Boxes & Matching Gifts
coupleGifts.description: Celebrate your love with matching couple gifts. From personalized couple mugs to engraved watches and necklaces — the perfect gift for anniversaries and special moments.

seo.title: Couple Gifts Egypt — Matching Personalized Gifts for Couples
seo.description: Shop the best couple gifts in Egypt — matching personalized mugs, engraved watches, necklaces & custom gift boxes. Perfect for anniversaries, Valentine's & special occasions.

birthdayGifts.title: Birthday Gifts
birthdayGifts.heading: Birthday Gift Boxes & Personalized Birthday Presents
birthdayGifts.description: Make birthdays unforgettable with a personalized gift box. Custom engraved gifts with names, dates & personal messages delivered in luxury packaging.

seo.title: Birthday Gifts Egypt — Personalized Birthday Gift Boxes
seo.description: Find the perfect birthday gift — personalized gift boxes, engraved watches, custom mugs & more. Luxury packaging & fast delivery across Egypt.

anniversaryGifts.title: Anniversary Gifts
anniversaryGifts.heading: Anniversary Gift Boxes & Romantic Gifts
anniversaryGifts.description: Celebrate your special moments with luxury anniversary gifts. Personalized boxes with engraved names, dates, and heartfelt messages for your partner.

seo.title: Anniversary Gifts Egypt — Personalized Romantic Gift Boxes
seo.description: Shop luxury anniversary gifts — personalized gift boxes with engraved names & dates, matching couple gifts, and romantic presents. Fast delivery across Egypt.

personalizedMug.title: Personalized Mugs
personalizedMug.heading: Custom Engraved Mugs — Personalized with Names & Dates
personalizedMug.description: Our premium personalized mugs make the perfect gift for any occasion. Custom engraved with names, dates, and special messages on premium quality mugs.

seo.title: Personalized Mugs Egypt — Custom Engraved Mugs with Names
seo.description: Order personalized mugs with custom engraving — names, dates & messages. Perfect couples' mugs, birthday mugs & gift mugs. Premium quality & fast delivery in Egypt.

photoGifts.title: Photo Gifts
photoGifts.heading: Photo Gifts — Personalized with Your Special Moments
photoGifts.description: Turn your favorite memories into beautiful personalized gifts. Custom photo gifts including mugs, frames, and more — perfect for preserving special moments.

seo.title: Photo Gifts Egypt — Custom Photo Personalized Gifts
seo.description: Create personalized photo gifts — custom photo mugs, frames & engraved gifts with your favorite images. Perfect keepsake gifts with fast delivery in Egypt.
